no: Isra BG2 goes after adrian, dace, nephele, ninde, Coran, tiax and xan

conflicts.reason: CDTweaks romance cheats create stutter for mod NPCs

sum: Adds Isra, a cavalier paladin, as a joinable NPC in BG2/ToB, continuing her story from BG1 with new quests and romance.

co.no: UPSTREAM BUG: rh#fatesp.d parse error. Same mechanism as other GW-framework NPCs: gw_dlg_functions.tpa searches FATESP.DLG for the referenced fatesp_string. If that string is not found in FATESP.DLG, fatesp_state_isra and fatesp_transition_isra remain -99, causing COMPILE EVALUATE_BUFFER to fail with a parse error. Ensure Isra BG2 installs after EET has fully merged BG2 content and FATESP.DLG is populated.
